title: Coming soon: QGIS Plugins Website v4.0.0
content:
A planned update to the plugins.qgis.org website is coming on 13 July 2026.  The version v4.0.0 will include major improvements and changes related to the security checks and plugins auto-approval; and a new feature for Qt6 compatibility check. Plugin developers can preview the planned changes now to confirm nothing affects publishing. 

Read the full preview and details on our blog post. Thank you for being part of the QGIS community.

Double click this article to read more on the QGIS blog
